summary.en: Music-streaming service founded in Stockholm 2006 by Daniel Ek and Martin Lorentzon, launched 2008. Operates a textbook freemium model: ~250M MAU on the ad-supported free tier + ~250M paying Premium subscribers (€10.99/mo as of 2024) — Anderson 2009's canonical 1:9 ratio in production. Inverted the traditional music industry's per-track ownership economics (CD sales, iTunes downloads) into a per-listening-time access model where ~70% of revenue is paid back to rights-holders. Strategyzer's flagship Freemium case once Skype was sunsetted by Microsoft. The case shows three BMCs — the traditional music industry baseline being unbundled, then Spotify's free tier + premium tier in parallel — to make the cross-user subsidy mechanic legible.
summary.zh: 音乐流媒体服务,2006 年由 Daniel Ek 和 Martin Lorentzon 在斯德哥尔摩创立,2008 年正式上线。运营教科书级的 Freemium 模式:广告支持的免费档约 2.5 亿 MAU + 约 2.5 亿付费 Premium 订阅(2024 年价格 €10.99/月)—— 这正是 Anderson 2009 提出的经典 1:9 比例的现实样本。把传统唱片业「每首歌单独购买」(CD 销售、iTunes 下载)的经济模型彻底翻转成「按收听时长访问」,其中约 70% 收入回流给版权方。Skype 被微软关停后,Spotify 已成为 Strategyzer《商业模式新生代》Freemium 模式的旗舰案例。本案例用三张 BMC 呈现:被颠覆的传统唱片业基线,以及并排的 Spotify 免费档 + Premium 档,把「跨用户补贴」机制清楚呈现出来。

sources.label: Osterwalder & Pigneur · Business Model Generation · Wiley · 2010 (pp. 96-97 freemium pattern)
Chris Anderson · Free: The Future of a Radical Price · Hyperion · 2009 (1:9 ratio)
Sven Carlsson & Jonas Leijonhufvud · The Spotify Play · Diversion Books · 2021
